creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
(In reply to Älven from comment #5)
Hi, thanks for keeping an eye on this.  On my side, I'm trying to keep you informed of the progress that has been done on this bug (as far as I am aware).
As for alt-ergo, please wait until D48228 is done as I'm busy finalizing it. That DR includes the alt-ergo bit as well but needs a bit of a cleanup before being able to be merged.
